title: Subscription
description: An Office 365 Management Activity API subscription to a content type for receiving audit activity data.

contentType.description: The content type of the subscription.

webhook.description: The webhook configuration associated with the subscription.

address.description: The HTTPS endpoint that receives notifications.

authId.description: String included as Webhook-AuthID header in notifications.

expiration.description: Datetime after which notifications are no longer sent to the webhook.
